name: Brussel Sprout Oriental
recipeIngredient: 5 ounces Water chestnuts, drained and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Simmer the brussel sprouts, covered, in a small amount of salted water for about 8 to 10 minutes, or until tender. Drain.
2. Add the soy sauce, seasoned salt, butter (or margarine), and water chestnuts. Heat until thoroughly combined.
3. Serve hot.
